hero.subtitle: A student club at the University of Akli Mohand Oulhadj — Bouira, pushing the boundaries of electronics, robotics, and creative technology.

intro.title: Who We Are
intro.description: AFAQ is a student club where technology, electronics, creativity, innovation, and teamwork come together. We provide a space for students to learn, build, and grow through hands-on projects and collaborative events.

activities.title: Our Activities
activities.sub: From electronics to software, we cover the full spectrum of modern technology.

workshops.title: Workshops
workshops.desc: Hands-on learning sessions on Arduino, programming, electronics, and more.

robotics.title: Robotics
robotics.desc: Design, build, and program robots for competitions and research.

hackathons.title: Hackathons
hackathons.desc: Intense coding and innovation challenges to solve real problems.

competitions.title: Competitions
competitions.desc: Friendly tech competitions to showcase skills and win prizes.

training.title: Training
training.desc: Expert-led workshops and technical training sessions for all levels.

software.title: Software Dev
software.desc: Web, mobile, and systems programming projects with modern tools.

upcomingEvents.title: Upcoming Events
upcomingEvents.noEvents: No upcoming events at the moment. Stay tuned!

stats.title: AFAQ in Numbers
stats.subtitle: Our growing impact in the university and beyond.

cta.title: Ready to Build the Future?
cta.sub: Join AFAQ and be part of a community where ideas come to life.
